### Submission checklist
- [ ] I searched `src/_data/patterns/` and confirmed this pattern does not already exist
- [ ] I searched open PRs and issues for duplicates
- [ ] My demo is interactive and self-contained (no external dependencies)
- [ ] Both `fr` and `en` titles are filled in the JSON
- [ ] `firstSeenOn` contains a real product URL
- [ ] At least 2 examples are listed in the JSON and in this PR description
- [ ] I tested the page locally at `/fr/patterns/{slug}/`
- [ ] The demo fits within the height I set in `demos/{slug}.json`
